### Default\_Aurora\_Config


```typescript
Default_Aurora_Config: {
    height: number;
    width: number;
    mainEllipse: {
        left: number;
        top: number;
        rX: number;
        rY: number;
        deltaRX: number;
        deltaRY: number;
        color: string;
    };
    subEllipse: {
        left: number;
        top: number;
        rX: number;
        rY: number;
        color: string;
        deltaRX: number;
        deltaRY: number;
    };
    reflectEllipse: {
        left: number;
        top: number;
        rX: number;
        rY: number;
        deltaRX: number;
        deltaRY: number;
        color: string;
    };
}
```
